description_long: This is a high-top sneaker featuring a combination of black, gray, and blue synthetic materials with a white rubber sole. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue for comfort, with blue and gray patterned laces threaded through metal eyelets. The side panels display a mix of smooth and textured surfaces, with a circular patch and branding detail on the outer ankle. The heel area is reinforced and includes a blue ribbed accent, while the toe cap and mudguard are constructed from a darker, more durable material. The overall design is sporty and urban, suitable for casual wear in city environments.
description: A high-top sneaker with black, gray, and blue panels, white sole, and patterned laces, featuring branding and a ribbed blue heel accent.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the padded collar, blue ribbed heel accent, and reinforced heel panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the circular ankle patch, branding, and layered panel construction.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the patterned laces, padded tongue with branding, and toe cap design.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the smooth gray side panel and blue ribbed heel accent.
attribute_logo: Circular logo with stylized 'L' and bull, located on the tongue and outer ankle patch, in white and gray.
